description: Composition Red and navy blue check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, half sleeves and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate cold wash Hang to dry in shade Iron with medium heat Do not bleach A stylish cut and a flattering silhouette are the reasons why you should grab this shirt from turtle. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project, in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa. For those who are conscious of both the environment and fashion, this shirt is the right way to go! This shirt is best worn with corduroy trousers or jeans, with a similarly toned belt and shoes, or for a formal appeal, style this with chinos and formal shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
